data.title: ETHFI's price hovers around $1.15, showing mixed signals near key support. Breakout possible at $1.34 resistance level.

To potentially instigate a breakout, it is essential for Ether.Fi to surpass a significant resistance level at $1.34. The asset holds steady above crucial support thresholds.

data.title: Week 33 of Trump's 2nd term highlighted strong advancements in America's security, including the Department of Defense becoming the Department of War and the hunt for Maduro in Venezuela. A press conference in Tampa announced efforts to eliminate cartels and criminal organizations, with ICE launching a partnership program with law enforcement. General Bondi emphasized aggressive investigation and prosecution of crimes, with a focus on human smuggling.
data.description: In Week 33 of President Trump's 2nd term, there was significant progress in strengthening America's security. This included a meeting with the President of Poland, a renaming of the Department of Defense to the Department of War, and a mission to capture Maduro of Venezuela. A press conference in Tampa highlighted the US's efforts to eliminate cartels through Joint Task Force Alpha. Attorney General Pam Bondi emphasized the aggressive prosecution of crimes, especially human trafficking. Additionally, ICE announced a new Partnership Program with Law Enforcement. Participating agencies will be fully reimbursed for the salaries and benefits of eligible trained 287(g) officers. This push for security measures and anti-crime initiatives demonstrates the administration's commitment to law enforcement and national security. Full details available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Hisense showcases RGB-MiniLED & immersive sound at IFA 2025 with theme "AI Your Life". Exciting innovations in visual & audio entertainment.
data.description: In Berlin on September 6, 2025, Hisense, a prominent brand in consumer electronics and home appliances worldwide, unveils a noteworthy display at IFA 2025 under the banner "AI Your Life." Their exhibit highlights cutting-edge advancements in premium visual and audio entertainment. Central to this presentation is the world's most advanced smart TV, boasting exceptional features and a sleek design, captivating audiences with its state-of-the-art technology.

data.title: Benjamin Bilski of True Platform on Solana predicts AI will revolutionize trading, esp in U.S. market. Regulatory clarity needed.
data.description: According to Benjamin Bilski, the spokesperson for True AI trading platform on the Solana network, the potential availability of perpetual futures in the U.S. could have significant implications. Bilski highlighted that if these futures were accessible in the U.S., it would not only validate the platform's model but also lead to an expansion of the overall market. Despite not actively targeting the U.S. market, the team at True is supportive of global regulatory clarity. Bilski emphasized the importance of transparency, instant access, and self-custody in decentralized finance. True is preparing to launch its $TRUE token sale to support the creation of the first AI-native perpetuals DEX on Solana, aiming to merge high-speed off-chain execution with on-chain capabilities. The innovation in decentralized finance is expected to persist, with users continuing to seek these key features.

data.title: LINEA Association to airdrop native LINEA token for Ethereum layer-2 network on Sept 10. Learn all details now.
data.description: On September 10, the LINEA token, the native token of the Ethereum layer-2 network, will be discontinued by the Linea Association. This decision will impact an unspecified number of users who are currently holding LINEA tokens. The association has not provided specific details about the reasons behind this move or any potential alternatives for affected token holders.

data.title: Gold prices hit record highs above $3,500/oz, up 37% YTD in 2025, best since 1978, with GLD ETF attracting $11.3B inflows.(Graphics: Gold's unseen rally in nearly 50 years)
data.description: Gold has reached unprecedented levels in early September 2025, hitting above $3,500 per ounce and rising 37% year-to-date. The surge is attributed to economic risks, central bank actions, and a crisis of trust in U.S. institutions. The SPDR Gold Shares (GLD) ETF is trading at record highs and has seen $11.3 billion in inflows this year. In comparison, the iShares Gold Trust (IAU) has attracted $6.64 billion in inflows. The last time gold saw such a significant increase was in 1978 when it rose by 132% due to inflation and a lack of confidence in the U.S. dollar. This surge in gold prices reflects investors' concerns about long-term economic stability, political volatility, and the credibility of the U.S. dollar. According to Goldman Sachs analyst Samantha Dart, gold is now seen as a hedge against institutional breakdowns and the potential loss of the Federal Reserve's independence.

data.title: Tokenizing car reservations may unlock a $1 trillion market, offering transparency in queue positions and reducing markups.
data.description: Consumers looking to purchase new cars are encountering unclear waiting lists and significant price increases on the latest models. Through the tokenization of reservations, a system could be established that offers clear visibility into queue positions, which could potentially have a total value amounting to trillions of dollars.

data.title: Mark Cuban backs Dogecoin calling it 'Real Money,' while Kevin O'Leary sees it as 'Gambling.' Cuban's support boosted Dogecoin.
data.description: Billionaire investor Mark Cuban and Kevin O'Leary, well-known from "Shark Tank," have differing views on the meme cryptocurrency Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE). Cuban, also a minority owner of the Dallas Mavericks, has been a strong advocate for Dogecoin, leveraging his influence and social media platform to promote the coin. In February 2021, during a surge in Dogecoin's value, Cuban expressed his preference for the cryptocurrency over a lottery ticket. The Dallas Mavericks, previously mainly owned by Cuban, began accepting Dogecoin as payment earlier that year. Cuban's support for Dogecoin contrasts with O'Leary's stance, showcasing their differing perspectives on the digital currency.

data.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum reach record highs, but Dogecoin lags behind. Will DOGE have its turn to soar?
data.description: The price of Dogecoin is still significantly below its all-time high, while many other top cryptocurrencies are hitting record prices. There is uncertainty about whether Dogecoin will experience a resurgence and reach its previous peak.

data.title: Artelo Biosciences (Nasdaq: ARTL) to start public offering of common stock/pre-funded warrants for market conditions.
data.description: In Solana Beach, California, on September 3, 2025, Artelo Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: ARTL), a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company specializing in modulating lipid-signaling pathways for cancer, pain, dermatologic, and neurological conditions, has initiated an underwritten public offering of its common stock and/or pre-funded warrants. The Company will offer all shares in the offering, and its completion depends on market conditions. This offering does not have a guaranteed timeline for completion or specific details regarding size or terms.

data.title: Solana (SOL) drops 2% to $202.36 on SEC delay. 2.9B transactions in Aug, TVL at 3-year high.
data.description: The cryptocurrency SOL is currently trading at $202.36, experiencing a decrease of 1.97% as the SEC's delay in approving an ETF is impacting its price. Despite this, Solana network showcased strong performance by processing 2.9 billion transactions in August and reaching a 3-year high in Total Value Locked (TVL).
